title: Govt approves reduction of excise duty on diesel until mid-June - Delfi
summary_full: Govt approves reduction of excise duty on diesel until mid-June  DelfiLithuania cuts train ticket prices in half due to rising fuel costs  Railway PROLithuania’s cabinet backs temporary diesel tax cut to curb price surge  LRTLithuania cuts local train fares by 50% through early summer  Caliber.AzNausėda proposes setting daily fuel price cap  Delfi
summary_public: Govt approves reduction of excise duty on diesel until mid-June  DelfiLithuania cuts train ticket prices in half due to rising fuel costs  Railway PROLithuania’s cabinet backs temporary diesel tax cut…
